title: fibonacci
subject:
Write a program that takes one integer N as a command-line argument and prints the first N Fibonacci numbers (starting from 0, 1) on a single line, separated by single spaces, followed by a newline.

If N is 0 or negative, print just a newline.

Examples:
  $ python3 fibonacci.py 5
  0 1 1 2 3
  $ python3 fibonacci.py 1
  0
